description_long: This wallet features a rectangular form with a woven exterior, displaying a striking geometric pattern in black, cream, and brown tones. The main body is bordered by a solid brown trim, likely made of leather or faux leather, which adds structure and durability. The woven section is composed of interlocking diamond and square motifs, giving the wallet a traditional, artisanal appearance. A zipper closure runs along the top edge, providing secure access to the interior. The wallet appears slim and compact, suitable for carrying in a pocket or small bag. No visible brand logos, attachments, or signs of wear are present on the exterior.
description: Rectangular wallet with a woven geometric pattern in black, cream, and brown, bordered by brown trim and secured with a zipper closure.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full woven geometric pattern bordered by brown trim, with the zipper edge visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the slim profile of the wallet and the zipper running along the top edge.
description_view_2: Back view mirrors the front, displaying the same woven geometric pattern and brown trim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the wallet's slimness and the zipper closure.
attribute_decorative_pattern: Woven geometric pattern with interlocking diamonds and squares in black and cream on the main panels.
